name: Porcelain Stoneware Calculator
seo_description: Calculate porcelain stoneware tile boxes, adhesive and grout. Free tile calculator.
example_label: Calculatete boxes of porcelain tiles for 30m² (boxes of 1.44m², 60x60cm format).

range_hints.area: Area to cover with porcelain tiles

result_context: For {area} m²: {cajas_ud} boxes needed. Total: {cajas_ud} boxes ({area_merma_m2} m² with waste).
formula_display: Boxes = Area / m² per box (round up)
steps: Apply 5-8% waste (porcelain has less waste): 21 x 1.08 = 22.68 → 23 boxes
Recommend 1-2 extra boxes for future repairs
mistakes: Not using special adhesive for porcelain (not regular mortar)
Cutting porcelain without proper tool (fractures easily)
Not leaving expansion joints on large surfaces
description: Porcelain Stoneware Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
desc: Porcelain Stoneware Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
